name: ClawO11y OpenTelemetry
description: Exports traces, metrics, and logs using OTLP standard format for ClawO11y Web UI
author: ClawO11y Team

enabled.description: Enable or disable the OpenTelemetry plugin

endpoint.description: The base URL of your OTLP receiver

metric_interval_ms.description: Interval for exporting metrics in ms (default: 10000)

export_timeout_ms.description: Timeout for exporting OTLP payloads in ms (default: 5000)

root_idle_timeout_ms.description: How long to keep a root command trace open after the last related event for the same session (default: 60000)
